error_signature: OAuth callback failed because of insufficient permissions
title: Insufficient permissions for OAuth callback
symptom: When attempting to link to Google OAuth, the user receives an error stating 'OAuth callback failed because of insufficient permissions'. The callback URL does not reflect the updated port number.
not_this_if: No changes made to environment variables
root_cause: The error occurs because the OAuth redirect URL is not updated to reflect the new port number set in the Docker configuration. The environment variable for the webhook URL must be explicitly set to ensure the correct port is used.
fix_steps: Add the environment variable WEBHOOK_URL with the value http://localhost:15678 to your docker-compose.yml
Restart the n8n Docker container to apply the changes
agent_instruction: Set the WEBHOOK_URL environment variable to include the new port and restart the container.
